cptDescriptions.72158: MRI lumbar spine without contrast followed by with contrast

icd10Descriptions.M51.16: Intervertebral disc disorder with radiculopathy, lumbar
icd10Descriptions.M51.17: Intervertebral disc disorder with radiculopathy, lumbosacral

criteria.description: Conservative therapy (physical therapy, NSAIDs, activity modification) for minimum 6 weeks with documented failure
Neurological symptoms present: radiculopathy, numbness/tingling, weakness, or bowel/bladder dysfunction
Red flag symptoms absent OR if present, urgent/emergent pathway applies (cauda equina, progressive neuro deficit, suspected malignancy)
No MRI of the same region within the past 12 months unless new symptoms documented

urgentBypass: If cauda equina syndrome suspected (bilateral leg weakness, saddle anesthesia, bowel/bladder dysfunction), immediate MRI is authorized without conservative therapy requirement.
denialReasons: No documented neurological findings on exam
Recent MRI within 12 months without new symptoms
Non-specific low back pain without radicular features
